description: Milestone 11: Activate push notifications end-to-end. Requires an Apple Developer Account. Add the Push Notifications entitlement and Background Modes capability, and verify APNs token registration works on a real device.

userStories.title: Add Push Notifications entitlement and capability
userStories.description: Add the aps-environment entitlement and Push Notifications capability to the Xcode project so APNs token registration succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: PIRATEN.entitlements file exists with aps-environment key
Push Notifications capability is added to the Xcode project
Background Modes capability added with remote-notification enabled
App builds successfully with the new entitlements

userStories.title: Implement device token registration with backend
userStories.description: Send the APNs device token to the backend so the server can send push notifications. Requires backend endpoint to be available (see OQ-08).
acceptanceCriteria: Device token is sent to backend registration endpoint after successful APNs registration
Token is re-sent on app launch if notification settings are enabled
Error handling for failed registration attempts

userStories.title: Verify end-to-end push notification delivery
userStories.description: Test that push notifications are received on a real device, appear correctly, and deep links route to the correct screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Push notification received on real device with correct banner/sound/badge
Tapping notification routes to correct Message thread or Todo detail
Notification settings toggles correctly control which categories are received
